hero.subtitle: Join the movement. Transform your body. Become unstoppable.

community.missionText: Our mission is simple: to help you become the strongest, most confident, most unstoppable version of yourself.
community.joinCtaDescription: Become part of a global community of athletes pushing their limits every day.

values.brotherhoodDesc: We train together, we grow together. Every member is family. When one rises, we all rise.
values.disciplineDesc: Consistency beats intensity. Show up every single day, no matter the circumstances.
values.excellenceDesc: Good enough is never good enough. We push for greatness in everything we do.
values.passionDesc: Love the process. The results will follow. Find joy in the grind.
values.globalUnityDesc: Athletes from every corner of the world, united by a single mission.
values.strengthDesc: Physical, mental, emotional. We build strength in all its forms.

challenges.title: Challenges
challenges.subtitle: Push your limits with our structured fitness challenges
challenges.sectionSubtitle: Ready to test yourself? Join one of our community challenges and compete with athletes worldwide.
challenges.pageSubtitle: Join structured programs designed to test your limits and transform your body. Compete with athletes worldwide and track your progress.

workouts.title: Workout Library
workouts.subtitle: Expert-designed exercises for every muscle group
workouts.sectionSubtitle: Explore our extensive collection of exercises with video tutorials and expert guidance.
workouts.pageSubtitle: Explore our extensive collection of exercises with video tutorials, detailed instructions, and expert tips.

shop.sectionSubtitle: Premium athletic wear designed for performance and built to last.
